_skills._description: Base runtime module contract for object ownership, object packs, and executable underscore-prefixed commands.
_core_rules: Every module must have a unique _name.
Modules expose commands through methods prefixed with underscore.
Command names remove the leading underscore and convert dashes to underscores internally.
Modules own and create registered XObject classes.
Do not mutate another module's objects directly.

_skills._description: Base runtime object for identity, typing, composition, lifecycle hooks, events, data binding, and nano-command execution.

_fields._data_source: XData key to bind this object to.

_core_rules: All Xpell runtime objects inherit this contract.
Generated object JSON must be data-only.
Do not generate JavaScript functions.
Use _children for composition.
Use _on/_once with nano-command strings or data-only command objects.
_notes: Runtime methods include parse, append, run, execute, bindDataSource, unbindDataSource, toXData, dispose, and removeChild.
Most prompts should use this skill as a compact dependency summary, not full context.

_skills._description: Client-side UI module for creating, mounting, removing, theming, and managing DOM-backed XUI objects.
_core_rules: XUI creates and mounts UI objects.
XUI does not own navigation; XVM controls active views.
XUI.add() and XUI.mount() must not call show().
Use XUI object _type values, not raw HTML unless needed.
Use themes and semantic fields instead of raw style/class.

_modules._description: Client-side UI module for creating, mounting, removing, theming, and managing DOM-backed XUI objects.

_ops._description: Register a named XUI theme token object.
Apply a named CSS theme or inline token theme.

_params._theme: Theme name or CSS variable token map.

_ops._description: Create the root XUI player element.

_params._set_as_main_player: Whether to set as main XUI player.
_params._theme: Optional theme name or token map.

_objects._description: Basic XUI container view. Used as a generic layout/root container for child UI objects.

_fields._theme: Optional theme when used as root view.
_fields.class: Optional CSS class. Defaults to xview.

_core_rules: Use view as a generic container.
Use _children for nested UI structure.
Do not use view when a more semantic object exists.

_objects._description: Generic raw HTML wrapper object for unsupported or custom HTML tags.

_fields._html_tag: HTML tag name to render, e.g. div, span, article, section, nav.
_fields._children: Nested UI objects or XHTML content.

_core_rules: Prefer semantic XUI objects when available.
Use xhtml only when no dedicated XUI wrapper exists.
Use _html_tag to select the rendered HTML tag.
Do not use xhtml as the default container type.

_objects._description: Hyperlink UI object rendered as an HTML anchor element.
_core_rules: Use link for navigation URLs and external resources.
Use button for actions.
Use target:'_blank' for external links when needed.
Use rel:'noopener noreferrer' with _blank for security.

_objects._description: Text label UI object rendered as an HTML label element.
_core_rules: Use label for short text and form labels.
Use for when connecting label to an input id.
Use button or link for interactive actions.

_objects._description: Clickable button UI object rendered as an HTML button element.

_fields.type: Button type: button, submit, or reset.

_core_rules: Use button for actions.
Use link for navigation URLs.
Use type:'submit' inside forms when submitting a form.
Prefer _flow for business actions.
Use _on.click for local UI actions.

_objects._description: Single-line text input rendered as an HTML input element.
_core_rules: Use text for single-line text input.
Use textarea for multiline text.
Use password for password input.
Use name when input belongs to a form.
Use _data_source when binding input value to XData.

_objects._description: Password input rendered as an HTML input element with type='password'.

_fields._text: Initial password value. Avoid using for real passwords.
_fields.value: Password input value. Avoid hardcoding real passwords.
_fields.name: Form/input name.
_fields.autocomplete: Browser autocomplete hint, usually current-password or new-password.
_fields._data_source: Optional XData key for password value.
_fields._update_data_source_on_change: When true, updates _data_source in XData on input/change.

_core_rules: Use password for password fields.
Do not use text with type:'password'.
Do not hardcode real password values in generated JSON.
Use autocomplete:'current-password' for login forms.
Use autocomplete:'new-password' for signup/reset forms.

_objects._description: Generic HTML input field base object for text, password, checkbox, radio, and other input types.

_fields.name: Input/form name.
_fields._data_source: Optional XData key bound to the input value.
_fields._update_data_source_on_change: When true, updates _data_source whenever the input value changes.
_fields._update_data_source_event: DOM event used for updates. Usually input or change.

_core_rules: Use input as a generic HTML input abstraction.
Prefer semantic child types like text or password when possible.
Use _data_source for reactive form state.
Use _update_data_source_on_change for realtime XData synchronization.

_objects._description: Multiline text input rendered as an HTML textarea element.
_core_rules: Use textarea for multiline text.
Use text for single-line text.
Use _data_source for reactive content.

_objects._description: Video UI object rendered as an HTML video element.

_fields.autoplay: Autoplay video when allowed by browser.
_fields.preload: Browser preload mode: none, metadata, or auto.
_fields._children: Optional source/track children only when needed.

_core_rules: Use video for video playback.
Use controls:true for user-controlled playback.
Autoplay usually requires muted:true.
Use poster for preview image when available.
Do not use video as a generic container.

_objects._description: Image UI object rendered as an HTML img element.

_fields.loading: Browser loading mode, e.g. lazy or eager.
_fields._children: Do not use children with image.

_core_rules: Use image for visual image content.
Always provide alt text when possible.
Use src for the image URL.
Do not place _children inside image.

_objects._description: Semantic HTML form container for grouping input fields and submit actions.

_fields._children: Form fields, labels, buttons, and layout children.
_fields.method: Optional native form method, usually get or post.
_fields.name: Optional form name.

_core_rules: Use form when inputs belong to one submit action.
Use field components inside form when available.
Use button with type:'submit' for native submit behavior.
Prefer _flow or _on.submit for app logic.
Do not use form only as a visual container.

_objects._description: Webcam video object using browser mediaDevices.getUserMedia.
_core_rules: Use webcam only when live camera input is required.
Requires browser camera permission.
Do not use webcam for normal video playback; use video instead.

_objects._description: Inline SVG container for vector graphics, icons, diagrams, and animated visual elements.

_fields._url: External SVG URL to fetch and inline.
_fields._svg_data: Raw SVG markup string to inject.

_core_rules: Use svg for inline vector graphics, icons, and diagrams.
Use image for normal raster/static images.
Prefer XSVG shape objects for generated simple SVG graphics.
Do not use svg as a generic layout container.
Use _svg_data only with trusted SVG content.

_objects._description: SVG circle shape.
SVG rectangle shape.
SVG ellipse shape.
SVG line shape.
SVG polyline shape.

_fields.points: List of points for the polyline.

_objects._description: SVG polygon shape.

_fields.points: List of points for the polygon.

_objects._description: SVG path shape.
Base UI runtime object for DOM creation, mounting, visibility, styling classes, semantic variants, UI events, and flow triggering.

_fields._flow: Flow id or flow definition triggered by UI event.
_fields._flow_event: DOM event that triggers _flow. Default click.
_fields._flow_auto: Disable automatic flow binding when false.
_fields._dom_attrs: Any non-underscore field is passed as a DOM attribute when supported, e.g. id, title, role, aria-label, data-*.

_core_rules: Use XUIObject fields for UI behavior only.
Use _children for UI composition.
Use _variant, _tone, _size, _density, and _elevation instead of raw class/style.
Use _on.click for local UI actions.
Use _flow for app/business actions.
Do not generate JavaScript functions in JSON.
_notes: XUIObject can trigger flows through _flow and ui:flow-trigger.

_skills._description: Client-side key-value persistence bridge for XDBClient/local storage style operations.
_core_rules: Use xdb-client for client-side persistence.
Use XData/xd for reactive runtime state.
Do not use xdb-client for server entity operations.
Use string ops for simple values and object ops for JSON data.

_modules._description: Client-side key-value persistence bridge for XDBClient/local storage style operations.

_ops._description: Return XDB client module info.
Check whether a key exists.
Get a stored string value.
Save a string value.
Get a stored JSON object.
Save a JSON object.
Remove a stored key.
Clear all client XDB storage.
Return all stored keys.

_skills._description: Client-side view manager for app manifests, containers, regions, routes, history, hash navigation, and view stacking.
_core_rules: XVM controls application navigation and view lifecycle.
Use XVM for routes, regions, containers, history, and app manifest loading.
XUI creates and renders objects; XVM decides what view is active.
Use navigate for route/hash navigation.
Use show for stacking a view without changing URL hash.
Use snake_case params.

_modules._description: Client-side view manager for app manifests, containers, regions, routes, history, hash navigation, and view stacking.

_ops._description: Load an XVM app manifest.
Show a view or route in a region/container without changing URL hash.

_params._allow_create_from_raw: Allow creating a view from raw registry.

_ops._description: Navigate to a route or view and update hash if region policy allows.
Navigate back in the region/container history stack.

_params._if_empty_close: Close region if history is empty.

_ops._description: Close the active view in a region/container.
Return XVM help or command-specific help.

_skills._description: Client-side flow runtime bridge. Binds UI/runtime events to server flows, triggers flows through XUIRuntime, writes flow outputs into XData, and executes on_success/on_error commands.
_core_rules: Use flow-client to trigger server-side flows from UI/runtime events.
Use _flow on XUIObject for common UI-triggered flows.
Flow outputs are written to XData by output key.
Use _on_success and _on_error in flow definitions for post-flow commands.
Do not run server business logic directly on the client.

_fields._flow: XUIObject field for flow id or flow definition.
_fields._flow_event: DOM event that triggers _flow. Default click.
_fields._flow_auto: Disable automatic flow binding when false.
_fields._flow._payload: Payload object passed to the flow.
_fields.$xdata.key: Use XData references inside flow payloads.

_modules._description: Client-side flow runtime bridge. Binds UI/runtime events to server flows, triggers flows through XUIRuntime, writes flow outputs into XData, and executes on_success/on_error commands.

_ops._description: Bind a XEM/runtime event to a server flow execution.

_params._event: XEM event name to listen for.

_ops._description: Trigger a server flow directly from the client.

_params._event_payload: Optional payload object passed to the flow.
_params._app_id: Optional app id. Defaults from XUIRuntime client.
_params._env: Optional environment. Defaults from XUIRuntime client.

_ops._description: Return flow-client help.

_skills._description: Client-side runtime entity manager for synced CRUD operations and local entity cache access.
_core_rules: Use entity-client for runtime CRUD operations.
Entity records are synced through XDBSyncManager.
Entity subscriptions are created automatically on first usage.
Use _entity to select the target entity.
Use _filter for querying and updates.

_modules._description: Client-side runtime entity manager for synced CRUD operations and local entity cache access.

_ops._description: Add a new entity record.
Find entity records using a filter.
Update entity records using filter + update payload.
Delete entity records using a filter.
Synchronize entity records from the server into the local runtime cache.
Return locally cached entity records.

_skills._description: Shared runtime state store used by Xpell modules and objects for reactive data binding.
_core_rules: Use XData for shared runtime state.
Use _data_source on objects to bind to an XData key.
Use $xdata.key references in generated payloads when a flow or command needs current state.
Do not use XData as hidden local component state.
XData keys should be explicit and stable.

_fields._data_source: XData key used by XObject/XUIObject for reactive data binding.
_fields.$xdata.key: Runtime payload reference to an XData value.

_modules._description: Shared runtime state store used by Xpell modules and objects for reactive data binding.

_ops._description: Get value from XData store.
Set value in XData store.
Patch plain object into existing XData value.
Delete XData key.
Trigger XData subscribers without changing value.
Check if XData key exists.

_skills._description: Global runtime event bus for decoupled communication between Xpell modules, objects, flows, and UI components.
_core_rules: Use XEM for decoupled runtime events.
Use explicit event names and explicit payload objects.
Do not use XEM as state storage.
Use XData for shared state and XEM for notifications/events.
Prefer _on/_once on objects for local event handlers.
_notes: XEM is process-wide and listener order should not be assumed.

_modules._description: Global runtime event bus for decoupled communication between Xpell modules, objects, flows, and UI components.

_ops._description: Fire a global XEM event with optional payload data.
